question.content: For the same cycle with compressor adiabatic efficiency and expander internal efficiency both equal to 0.85, compute compressor theoretical specific work for no-regeneration and regeneration cases. Output exactly two decimal numbers separated by one comma as no_regen,regen, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Apply efficiency corrections to compressor states for both configurations.
step_1.key_point: Efficiency corrections to compressor states for both configurations.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up relation for compressor specific work in no-regen and regen cases.

step_5.content: Compute and output the two compressor specific-work values.
step_5.key_point: Compute compressor work for no-regen and regen.
